name: Moelis & Co
summary: Overview Moelis & Company is a leading global independent investment bank that provides innovative strategic and financial advice and solutions to a diverse client base, including corporations, financial sponsors, governments and sovereign wealth funds. We assist our clients in achieving their strategic goals by offering comprehensive, globally integrated financial advisory services across all major industry sectors.
